task.title: Integration Management API
task.description: Create REST API endpoints for CRUD operations on integrations with Effect validation

implementation.details:
1. Implement POST /api/v1/integrations with Effect Schema
2. Add GET, PATCH, DELETE endpoints
3. Create integration testing endpoint
4. Add OAuth flow handling for supported channels
5. Implement proper error responses with Effect

task.acceptance_criteria: All CRUD operations work, validation prevents invalid configurations, test endpoint verifies channel connectivity
